goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should depart from 'kings lynn'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 11:30'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '8 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '5 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should depart from kings lynn
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 11:30
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 8 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
